subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast in the Covenant! Ye are ever present in my thoughts, before my vision, and in my presence, and not for a moment do I cease to remember you [3.5s]... ...O Thou Provider, O Thou Forgiver! A noble soul hath ascended unto the Kingdom of reality
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان همیشه در نظرید و پیش بصرید و حاضر محضرید و آنی فراغت از یاد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
